title: Skill YAML frontmatter
description: Strict schema for the YAML frontmatter at the top of a plugin's skills/<skill-name>/SKILL.md file.

name.description: Optional; if omitted the containing directory name is used.

description.description: Required. Used by the model to decide when to invoke the skill.

disable-model-invocation.description: If true, the skill can only be invoked via /namespace:name and not auto-chosen by the model.
